name: Icelandic+ Cod Skin Strips Dog Treats, 16-oz bag
description: Give your pup a treat straight from the pure waters of the North Atlantic with Cod Skin Strips from Icelandic+. These treats feature Icelandic cod skins as the only ingredient with no additives, supplements or preservatives. The cod is line-caught daily and processed immediately for freshness your paw-tner can taste. These skins are rich in omega-3 fatty acids to support healthy skin and a shiny coat. They also promote dental wellness in your furry friend by reducing tartar and plaque build-up for healthier teeth and gums. Icelandic+ Cod Skin Strips Dog Treats even come in a resealable bag to keep them nice and fresh for your companion.
